items.name: brpc
items.description: brpc is an Industrial-grade RPC framework using C++ Language, which is often used in high performance system such as Search, Storage, Machine learning, Advertisement, Recommendation etc. "brpc" means "better RPC".

items.name: agam-ml
items.description: Machine learning framework — tensors, autodiff, training loops, GPU-native

items.name: Donation-forecasting-research
items.description: This research aims to develop and compare multiple time-series machine learning models to predict future donation trends for community food assistance programs. The core contribution is an anomaly-aware, multivariate forecasting framework that not only predicts donation volume but specifically identifies upcoming donation drought periods

items.name: Rs_coverage
items.description: This study used two contrasting machine learning frameworks to explore how data coverage influences high-latitude Rs modeling and prediction: an Annual Coverage Model (ACM), trained solely on sites with full annual observational records, and a Hybrid Dataset Model (HDM), which integrated seasonally incomplete sites as well.

items.name: multi-stage-insurance-claim-prediction
items.description: Machine learning framework for insurance claim classification and claim cost prediction.

items.name: QuantTradeAI
items.description: A comprehensive machine learning framework for quantitative trading strategies

items.name: machine-learning
items.description: Implementing a diverse range of machine learning and optimization without frameworks and some neural networks, deep learning with framework

items.name: Custom-Neural-Network-Framework
items.description: Custom made machine learning library with various test. Only uses numpy for faster calculations

items.name: ML-framework-for-SWF-retrieval
items.description: Machine learning framework for estimating global Surface Water Fraction (SWF) from passive microwave brightness temperatures (WindSat/CIMR). Covers end-to-end data preprocessing, EDA, and a full regression pipeline including model selection, feature engineering, HPO, SHAP explainability, and error analysis.

items.name: tradingsystem
items.description: Modular backtesting framework for algorithmic trading using Backtrader. Features a 4-phase state machine strategy, JPY pair P&L correction (ERIS logic), and professional reporting. Educational resource for learning systematic trading.

items.name: Foam-Agent
items.description: Foam-Agent: An end-to-end, composable multi-agent framework for automating CFD simulations in OpenFOAM. NeurIPS 2025 Machine Learning and the Physical Sciences Workshop.

items.name: MLServer
items.description: An inference server for your machine learning models, including support for multiple frameworks, multi-model serving and more

items.name: BO-ML
items.description: A unified machine learning framework for Parkinson’s disease detection with feature selection, Bayesian optimization, and explainable AI.

items.name: pixelArtist
items.description: Simple Framework to create game for my machine learning research testing AI

items.name: ms-subtype-classification-xai
items.description: Explainable Machine Learning framework for Multiple Sclerosis (MS) subtype classification (RRMS, SPMS, PPMS) using clinical and MRI-derived features, integrating SHAP-based interpretability and counterfactual explanations for actionable insights.

items.name: accelera
items.description: Accelera is a cutting-edge ML pipeline framework . It provides a robust, scalable solution for building and deploying machine learning workflows with optimized performance.

items.name: awesome-mlops
items.description: A curated list of tools, frameworks, platforms, and resources for Machine Learning Operations (MLOps).

items.name: deep-learning-models
items.description: I’m a passionate machine learning practitioner who transforms raw data into smart, real‑world applications. Over the past months, I’ve developed and deployed multiple end‑to‑end projects covering natural language processing, computer vision, and classical machine learning – all built from scratch or fine‑tuned using modern frameworks.

items.name: CircumSpectrum
items.description: CircumSpectrum is a flux-based framework that converts bulk and single-cell RNA-seq data into metabolic fingerprints using genome-scale models and machine learning. It includes RADAR, SOURIS, and CORALIE modules for reaction-level, cross-cohort, and multi-tier correlation analyses.

items.name: zenml
items.description: ZenML is an open-source MLOps and LLMOps framework that unifies machine learning and generative AI workflows through a single orchestration, versioning, and governance layer.

items.name: ML_forex_Framework
items.description: A professional-grade machine learning framework designed for (M15) quantitative analysis and automated execution on (XAU). This project demonstrates an end-to-end ML pipeline, from high-fidelity data ingestion to advanced feature engineering and ensemble model training.

items.name: pytorch
items.description: APIs and resources for PyTorch, an open source machine learning framework for tensor computation and deep learning developed by Meta.

items.name: Multi-Source-Data-Wheat-Yield-Model
items.description: The model integrates 252,056 field records from 18,004 sites across China to build a multi-source data–driven machine learning framework for wheat yield prediction. Based on this model, N, P, and K fertilization strategies were optimized for agronomic (AOF), economic (EOF), and environmental–social (ESOF) benefits.

items.name: Chonky
items.description: A text-processing framework for machine-learning workflows based in python

items.name: inland-water-garbage-detection-
items.description: A machine learning framework for detecting garbage in inland water using public complaints and satellite images

items.name: MassBalanceMachine
items.description: Global machine learning glacier mass balance framework, capable of assimilating all sources of glaciological and remote sensing data

items.name: federated-healthcare-ml
items.description: A comprehensive framework for federated learning applied to healthcare machine learning problems.

items.name: ml-model-monitoring
items.description: Monitoring framework for a machine learning anomaly detection system including drift detection, metric tracking, and production monitoring.

items.name: apache-mahout
items.description: Apache Mahout is an open-source framework for building scalable machine learning applications.

items.name: caretSDM
items.description: caretSDM applies a geoprocessing framework to the caret machine learning package, facilitating the access of Species Distribution Modeling community to state-of-the-art methods.

items.name: awesome-machine-learning
items.description: A curated list of awesome frameworks, libraries, tools, tutorials, datasets, and research papers in machine learning. This list covers a wide array of topics, from foundational algorithms to modern techniques in supervised, unsupervised, and reinforcement learning.

items.name: awesome-ai
items.description: A curated list of awesome frameworks, libraries, tools, and resources for Artificial Intelligence (AI). This list covers everything from foundational machine learning and deep learning to specialized areas like NLP, computer vision, and AI ethics.

items.name: CoinageClusterML
items.description: Machine Learning framework for predicting binding energies and magic numbers in Cu, Ag, and Au nanoclusters (N ≤ 55) using the Open Quantum Cluster Database (OQCD). Features 7 ensemble models, SHAP interpretability, and 9 geometric descriptors.

items.name: jaggery-color-classification
items.description: Machine learning framework for pre-manufacturing jaggery color prediction using soil and water parameters

items.name: Fraud-Detection-Engine
items.description: a software framework or repository designed to identify and prevent unauthorized activities—such as credit card fraud, insurance scams, or bot traffic—using data analysis and machine learning

items.name: Hybrid-AgriPrice-Forecaster
items.description: A Hybrid Machine Learning and Foundation Model Framework for Multi-Market Agricultural Price Forecasting in India with Weather-Integrated Agriculture Analytics

items.name: bristol-ml
items.description: Framework code to discuss, design and implement in Bristol Machine Learning and Data Science meetups

items.name: coracle
items.description: Machine Learning Framework to Identify Coral Bacteria Associated with Thermal Resilience

items.name: aspirin001
items.description: 🤗 Transformers: the model-definition framework for state-of-the-art machine learning models in text, vision, audio, and multimodal models, for both inference and training.

items.description: 🤗 Transformers: the model-definition framework for state-of-the-art machine learning models in text, vision, audio, and multimodal models, for both inference and training.

items.name: Forecasting-County-Level-Housing-Demand-Supply-Gaps-in-Ireland-2026-2030-
items.description: This repository operationalizes a county-level housing intelligence framework for Ireland, combining forecasting, explainable machine learning, and scenario-based demand planning to support evidence-based policy and resource allocation.

items.name: A-REFINED-MACHINE-LEARNING-SENSOR-FUSION-FRAMEWORK-FOR-HIGH-FIDELITY-VEHICLE-ACCIDENT-CLASSIFICATION
items.description: A multi-sensor ML framework using GY-87 IMU, NEO-6M GPS & ESP8266 on an RC vehicle to classify vehicle accidents (Collision, Fall-Off, Normal Driving) with 98.84% accuracy via a Stacking Ensemble (ANN + SVM + Decision Tree + Naive Bayes). Includes ADASYN augmentation, feature engineering, and permutation importance analysis. | B.Tech CSE

items.name: An-Explainable-Machine-Learning-Framework-for-Diagnosing-Spine-Hip-Disorders
items.description: Complete analysis of the code (14 Python scripts), covering environment setup, data import, descriptive statistics, correlation analysis, dataset A/B modeling, ROC curves, SHAP analysis, feature importance, Bootstrap validation, calibration and DCA analysis, confusion matrix, and a Streamlit application.

items.name: heat
items.description: Distributed tensors and Machine Learning framework with GPU and MPI acceleration in Python

items.name: Turingz
items.description: A hybrid machine learning and classical numerical framework for solving Partial Differential Equations (PDEs) , featuring real-time failure detection , robustness evaluation , and adaptive resource orchestration (deployment and computational cost)

items.name: interpretable-ai-shap-framework
items.description: An interpretable machine learning framework using SHAP values for model explainability on loan prediction data. Built with Python, Flask, and XGBoost.

items.name: A-Hybrid-Supervised-Unsupervised-Framework-for-Insider-Threat-Detection
items.description: Detects insider threats using machine learning by analyzing user behavior, system access, and anomalies. Includes simulated logs, anomaly detection models, a combined dashboard, explainability tools, graph analysis, and red team simulation.

items.name: pamiq-core
items.description: Framework for building AI agents with real-time adaptive learning capabilities.

items.name: nexus-machine-learning
items.description: Framework-agnostic machine learning platform for feature extraction, model inference, and predictive analytics with multi-provider support

items.name: Risk-Return-Efficient-Portfolio-Construction-via-Convex-Optimization-A-Machine-Learning-Approach
items.description: This project bridges deep learning forecasts and portfolio optimization. We evaluate five machine learning models on US equities, pairing their return predictions with Mean-Variance and CVaR allocation frameworks. Via walk-forward backtesting, we analyze how forecast errors impact out-of-sample portfolio performance and robustness.

items.name: Sauca_AI
items.description: A no-code AutoML and data science framework designed to democratize advanced machine learning and streamline predictive analytics.

items.name: F1-miami-gp-predictor-2026
items.description: An ensemble machine learning framework (XGBoost, Random Forest, Monte Carlo) to predict F1 results using early-season data.

items.name: Algorith_Project
items.description: BST-based hyperparameter optimization framework with transfer learning analysis across datasets, built using custom data structures and machine learning pipelines.

items.name: SMART-HUNTER
items.description: This project is an Automated Penetration Testing and Vulnerability Scanning Framework. It is designed to all-in-one automated handles everything from initial web reconnaissance to vulnerability detection. A unique aspect of this framework is its integration of Machine Learning to intelligently predict vulnerabilities based on reconnaissance data.

items.name: tensorflow-federated
items.description: An open-source framework for machine learning and other computations on decentralized data.

items.name: High-Throughput-Dengue-ML
items.description: A comprehensive machine learning framework designed for the efficient analysis and classification of Dengue-related transcriptomic data

items.name: High-Throughput-Dengue-ML
items.description: A comprehensive machine learning framework designed for the efficient analysis and classification of Dengue-related transcriptomic data

items.name: autonomous-dao-treasury
items.description: A smart-contract framework for self-managing DAO treasuries. It integrates machine learning models to adjust asset allocation based on market volatility and predefined risk parameters. Designed to ensure long-term sustainability by automating diversification and yield-harvesting without requiring constant manual intervention from members.

items.name: ASSISSTments-ML-XAI-Student-Performance
items.description: A comparative machine learning framework for student performance prediction using ASSISTments data, combining linear models (elastic net), ensemble methods (random forest, XGBoost), and explainable AI (SHAP).

items.name: Dual-Head-GNN-with-Adaptive-RL-Framework-for-FDIA-on-IIOT
items.description: Research work on False data injection attacks on Cyber Physical Systems using deep learning approaches. Novel Aprroach of Inter- and Intra machine based graph using spatio temporal model with Multi-Head Attention and used optimized Deep Q-Networks thershold.

items.name: ML_OFDM_PROJECT
items.description: The performance of different machine learning frameworks, like the support vector machine (SVM), random forest, gradient descent, and decision tree, is implemented to enhance the performance of the OFDM system model. The project can give effective performance concerning the machine learning model for different numbers of pilots and lengths of CPs.

items.name: QuantYogChain-Framework
items.description: QuantYogChain: Blockchain-Enabled Federated Quantum Machine Learning Framework for Secure YogAI-based Personalized Healthcare using wearable biosignal data (HRV, EDA, SpO2, Sleep). Includes VQC models, federated learning simulation, and blockchain-based aggregation.

items.name: AutoML-Implementation
items.description: A comprehensive AutoML (Automated Machine Learning) implementation featuring multiple algorithms, evaluation frameworks, and interactive demos for research and educational purposes.

items.name: DDOS_Mitigation
items.description: A lightweight and leakage-free machine learning framework for anomaly-based DDoS detection and mitigation in Modbus TCP industrial control systems, using protocol-specific features and real-time response mechanisms.

items.name: cademas-app
items.description: A Web Application for a Machine Learning implementation of CADEMAS framework

items.name: aqi-forecasting-indian-cities
items.description: Machine learning framework for forecasting Air Quality Index (AQI) across major Indian cities using pollution and meteorological data. Includes preprocessing, feature engineering, model training, evaluation, and comparative analysis of multiple regression models.

items.name: NorthSeaSR_Estimation
items.description: A comparative framework for sex ratio estimation in North Sea fish using classical statistics, machine learning, and deep learning.

items.name: AIfES_for_Arduino
items.description: This is the Arduino® compatible port of the AIfES machine learning framework, developed and maintained by Fraunhofer Institute for Microelectronic Circuits and Systems.

items.description: An intelligent cybersecurity platform that detects and prevents cyber threats using Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning.This system integrates multiple security modules into a centralized framework for real time monitoring and responese.

items.name: QuChaTeR
items.description: The official implementation and source code of "QuChaTeR: A Hybrid Quantum-Chaotic Temporal Framework for Earthquake Prediction", which has been accepted for presentation at the IEEE ICASSP 2026 conference at the Satellite Workshop on Quantum Machine Learning in Signal Processing and Artificial Intelligence.

items.description: A machine learning framework using Random Forest and SMOTE to predict survival outcomes in colorectal cancer patients

items.name: cerebrus
items.description: Cerebrus is an intelligent malware analysis framework designed to provide multi-layered defense against modern cyber threats. It integrates static analysis, machine learning, external threat intelligence, and explainable AI (XAI) to deliver a robust platform for detecting known and unknown malware across various file formats.

items.name: band-gap-delta-learning-dft-correction
items.description: Physics-informed machine learning framework to correct DFT (PBE) band gap errors using delta learning. Combines Magpie descriptors, PCA, Random Forest, and GPR to achieve ~0.55 eV RMSE, enabling accurate and scalable semiconductor materials discovery.

items.name: credit-portfolio-risk-optimization
items.description: An end-to-end analytics framework for retail credit decisioning that balances risk and profitability. It combines machine learning, financial metrics, and policy simulation to maximize expected portfolio value under risk constraints, reflecting real-world challenges faced by senior banking analytics teams.

items.name: quantum
items.description: An open-source Python framework for hybrid quantum-classical machine learning.

items.description: ML.NET is an open source and cross-platform machine learning framework for .NET.

items.description: Interpretable machine learning framework for Premier League match outcome prediction using SHAP and Streamlit.

items.name: rural-financial-access-scotland
items.description: Description: Geospatial analytics and machine learning framework for rural financial access analysis in Scotland.

items.description: A Python framework for machine learning experiments in industrial machinery fault diagnosis through vibration analysis.

items.name: MLJ.jl
items.description: A Julia machine learning framework

items.description: A differentiable PDE solving framework for machine learning

items.name: Heart-Disease-Classification-Analysis
items.description: This Machine Learning project presents a rigorous, leakage-aware hybrid soft-voting ensemble framework combining k-Nearest Neighbors (KNN), Support Vector Machine (SVM), and Random Forest (RF) for heart disease prediction on the UCI Cleveland dataset.

items.name: tenflowers
items.description: A pure Rust implementation of TensorFlow, providing a full-featured machine learning framework with Rust's safety and performance.

items.name: pennylane-qrack
items.description: The PennyLane-Qrack plugin integrates the Qrack quantum computing framework with PennyLane's quantum machine learning capabilities.

items.name: SECURAI
items.description: An advanced AI-powered security framework utilizing machine learning to detect anomalies, automate threat response, and provide predictive analytics for proactive network defense and data protection.

items.name: DDA3020-machine-learning-project
items.description: A hybrid trading framework combining LightGBM for trend prediction and PPO Reinforcement Learning for volatility-adaptive position sizing. Developed for DDA3020 at CUHK-Shenzhen.

items.name: QuantVn-WalkForward
items.description: An end-to-end Machine Learning Quantitative Trading framework designed for the Vietnam Stock Market, featuring strict Walk-Forward validation and realistic bt engine backtesting

items.name: opioid-cost-prediction-pbm-sdoh
items.description: Machine learning framework predicting U.S. county-level opioid cost per capita (2013–2023) by integrating Pharmacy Benefit Management (PBM) levers and Social Determinants of Health (SDOH). Includes data pipelines, simulation code, and reproducible figures.

items.name: c60.ai
items.description: C60.ai is a full-stack AutoML framework that builds, optimizes, and explains machine learning pipelines. C60 is experimental, deeply modular, and focused on adaptability, introspection, and autonomy — almost like a DAG-based scientific research assistant

items.name: AutoGradeNet
items.description: A Novel Fully Autonomous Machine Learning Framework for Human Free Multi Dimensional Student Assessment and Academic Performance Prediction

items.name: An-Interpretable-Machine-Learning-Approach-for-Diabetes-Risk-Prediction-
items.description: This Project focuses on developing an interpretable machine learning framework to predict the risk of diabetes using clinical diabetes data. The model integrates multiple patient features (glucose, insulin, BMI, age and blood pressure) to generate comprehensive risk assesment. Two types of models are used: Logistic Regression and Random Forest

items.name: PUREML-Machine-Learning-Toolkit-from-Scratch
items.description: PUREML is a custom machine learning library built entirely from scratch in Python. It focuses on implementing core machine learning algorithms and mathematical concepts without relying on external ML frameworks such as scikit-learn or TensorFlow.

items.name: ununennium
items.description: Ununennium (Element 119, the next alkali metal) represents the cutting edge of satellite imagery machine learning. This library provides a unified, GPU-first framework for end-to-end Earth observation workflows, from cloud-native data access through model training to deployment.
